BASELIB.MOD_CONFIG_SETTINGS_ROW.title: Mod Configuration (BaseLib)
BASELIB-RESTORE_DEFAULTS_BUTTON.title: Restore defaults
BASELIB-RESTORE_MODCONFIG_CONFIRMATION.b: Restore default settings for this mod?
BASELIB-SHOW_MOD_CONFIG_IN_MAIN_MENU.tit: Show Mod Configuration in main menu (restart required)
BASELIB-SHOW_MOD_CONFIG_IN_MAIN_MENU.hov: Show Mod Configuration in main menu
There's always an entry in the game's settings.
BASELIB-LOG_SECTION.title: Log window/Console
BASELIB-OPEN_LOG_WINDOW_ON_STARTUP.title: Open log window on startup
BASELIB-OPEN_LOG_WINDOW_ON_STARTUP.hover: Opens the BaseLib log window automatically when the main menu loads.
BASELIB-LIMITED_LOG_SIZE.title: Log history size
BASELIB-LIMITED_LOG_SIZE.hover.desc: Maximum number of lines retained in the in-game log window.
BASELIB-LOG_FONT_SIZE.title: Log font size
BASELIB-LOG_FONT_SIZE.hover.desc: Can also be set with Ctrl+scroll in the log window.
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_SECTION.title: Harmony patch dump
BASELIB-HARMONY_PATCH_DUMP_OUTPUT_PATH.h: Where to write the patch report. Use Browse to pick a file, or type a full path or Godot user:// path.
BASELIB-HARMONY_PATCH_DUMP_ON_FIRST_MAIN: Dump when main menu first loads
Once per game session, after the main menu finishes loading, write the report if the output path is set.
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_BROWSE.title: Browse…
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_BROWSE_FOR_OUTPUT.h: Opens a save dialog and fills the output path above.
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_WRITE_NOW.title: Write dump now
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_NOW.title: Dump now
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_WRITE_NOW.hover.des: Generates the report immediately using the output path. Check the log for success or errors.
BASELIB-HARMONY_DUMP_BROWSE_TITLE.title: Save Harmony patch dump
